title: Cobblemon EvoNotify
description: An evolution popup telling you when your cobblemon can evolve.
body:
Adds a popup window similar to the Pokemon games telling you when your Cobblemon can evolve. Clicking the evolve button will throw out your pokemon when possible to show the evolution animation.

![evolving example](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/562ab6fe3128e1941b1bed510b0cfbdb6af6b705.jpeg)
